differential_diagnoses: Pleuropulmonary blastoma (type I or associated with DICER1 mutation)
Meconium aspiration syndrome with secondary air leak syndrome
next_steps: Genetics consultation and testing for DICER1 mutation
Pathological review of placental and any potential future lung biopsy specimens
Surgical consultation for persistent focal lung opacity and potential mass resection
Serial monitoring of inflammatory markers and blood cultures for persistent febrile illness
